Title: User successfully logs in
Test Steps:
1. Click "Login" button.
2. Enter username "testuser" and password "testpassword".
3. Click "Submit" button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page.

Title: User fails to log in due to incorrect password
Test Steps:
1. Click "Login" button.
2. Enter username "testuser" and password "wrongpassword".
3. Click "Submit" button.
Expected Result: Error message indicating incorrect password is displayed.

Title: User fails to log in due to non-existent account
Test Steps:
1. Click "Login" button.
2. Enter username "nonexistuser" and password "testpassword".
3. Click "Submit" button.
Expected Result: Error message indicating non-existent account is displayed.

Title: User successfully registers
Test Data:
- Username: testuser
- Password: testpassword
- Confirm Password: testpassword
- Name: John Doe
- Surname: Doe
- Region: Test Region
- Province: Test Province
- City: Test City
Test Steps:
1. Click "Register" button.
2. Enter username "testuser", password "testpassword", confirm password "testpassword", name "John Doe", surname "Doe", region "Test Region", province "Test Province", city "Test City".
3. Click "Submit" button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the login page.

Title: User fails to register due to mismatched passwords
Test Data:
- Username: testuser
- Password: testpassword
- Confirm Password: wrongpassword
- Name: John Doe
- Surname: Doe
- Region: Test Region
- Province: Test Province
- City: Test City
Test Steps:
1. Click "Register" button.
2. Enter username "testuser", password "testpassword", confirm password "wrongpassword", name "John Doe", surname "Doe", region "Test Region", province "Test Province", city "Test City".
3. Click "Submit" button.
Expected Result: Error message indicating mismatched passwords is displayed.

Title: Coordinator successfully creates an emergency

- Start Date: 2023-10-01
- End Date: 2023-10-05
Test Steps:
1. Click "Inserisci emergenza" button.
2. Enter description "Test Emergency", region "Test Region", province "Test Province", start date "2023-10-01", end date "2023-10-05".
3. Click "Submit" button.
Expected Result: Emergency is created and displayed.

Test Steps:
1. Click "Inserisci emergenza" button.
2. Leave all fields empty.
3. Click "Submit" button.

Title: Coordinator successfully removes a volunteer from an emergency
Preconditions: Coordinator is logged in, volunteer is assigned to an emergency.
Test Steps:
1. Click "Visualizza emergenza" button.
2. Select emergency ID "1".
3. Select task ID "1".
4. Click "Rimuovi volontario" button.
Expected Result: Volunteer is removed from the emergency.

Title: Coordinator fails to remove a volunteer due to no volunteer being assigned
Preconditions: Coordinator is logged in, no volunteer is assigned to an emergency.
Test Steps:
1. Click "Visualizza emergenza" button.
2. Select emergency ID "1".
3. Select task ID "1".
4. Click "Rimuovi volontario" button.
Expected Result: Error message indicating no volunteer is assigned is displayed.

Title: Coordinator successfully terminates an emergency
Preconditions: Coordinator is logged in, emergency exists.
Test Steps:
1. Click "POST /terminaEmergenza" button.
2. Enter emergency ID "1".
3. Click "Submit" button.
Expected Result: Emergency is terminated and success message is displayed.

Title: Coordinator fails to terminate an emergency due to no emergency found
Preconditions: Coordinator is logged in, no emergency exists.
Test Steps:
1. Click "POST /terminaEmergenza" button.
2. Enter emergency ID "1".
3. Click "Submit" button.
Expected Result: Failure message indicating no emergency is displayed.

Title: Coordinator fails to terminate an emergency due to invalid token
Preconditions: Coordinator is logged in, emergency exists.
Test Steps:
1. Click "POST /terminaEmergenza" button.
2. Enter emergency ID "1".
3. Click "Submit" button.
Expected Result: Error message indicating invalid token is displayed.
